reason: Downstream claims only 4 DWH values (0-4) and flags IDs 5-17 as missing, but the source defines all 17 states as valid; this misrepresents the column's population as a subset.
proposed_fix: Primary key identifying withdrawal lifecycle state (17 values: 1=Pending through 17=Partially Reversed; 0=N/A is a DWH placeholder). See glossary for full mapping. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.CashoutStatus)
